constraint.definition: Precondition or bound that limits execution space

validation.definition: Pass/fail gate over a data or state assertion

semantic.definition: Relates to meaning, ontology, or token interpretation

reasoning.definition: Inference, deduction, or logical derivation capability

planning.definition: Goal decomposition and task sequencing capability

agent_runtime.definition: Controls or participates in agent lifecycle execution

memory_access.definition: Reads or writes to a persistent state or knowledge store

tool_interface.definition: Integrates with or wraps an external tool or LLM provider

learning.definition: Adapts behavior from observations or feedback signals

symbolic.definition: Operates over symbolic or formal logic representations

protocol.definition: Defines or enforces a structured communication protocol

orchestration.definition: Coordinates sequencing of multiple system components

bootstrap.definition: Involved in system startup or initialization

identity.definition: Manages or validates agent or resource identity

temporal.definition: Handles time-based ordering, supersession, or sequencing

trinitarian.definition: Applies three-part alignment or scoring logic (3OT)

input_sanitation.definition: Cleans and validates external inputs before processing

governance.definition: Subject to or enforces project governance contracts

deterministic.definition: Produces the same output for the same input (side-effect-free)

stateless.definition: Holds no persistent internal state between invocations

stateful.definition: Maintains state across invocations or sessions

audited.definition: Subject to audit logging or traceability requirements

embedded.definition: Directly embedded context in the DRAC invariant layer

support_services.definition: General-purpose helper with no direct reasoning role
